title: rubus limitaneus
intro: Rubus limitaneus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a type of shrub that belongs to the Rubus genus. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rubus limitaneus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and help manage various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Rubus limitaneus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine in the Himalayan region.
